message:
feat(benchmark): rewrite with Microsoft tsgo test suite

Rewrites benchmark/run.ts to use Microsoft's tsgo benchmark projects:
- rxjs (2.1K LOC)
- tRPC (18K LOC)
- date-fns (104K LOC)
- TypeORM (270K LOC)
- Playwright (356K LOC)
- VSCode (1.5M LOC)

Features:
- Downloads projects via git sparse checkout (only src folders)
- Compares EdgeBox vs Node.js tsc performance
- Validates output correctness (file-by-file comparison)
- CLI options: --quick, --no-vscode, --runs N

Usage:
  npx tsx run.ts              # Run all projects
  npx tsx run.ts --quick      # Run rxjs + trpc only
  npx tsx run.ts --runs 5     # More runs for stability
